traits.name: Assault
traits.effect: This attack gains +1 attack dice at half range.

traits.name: Blast
traits.effect: For the next attack with this weapon, if the attack has at least one hit or crit, all fighters (friend and foe) within 2" of the target suffer damage equal to a hit damage.

traits.name: Brutal
traits.effect: After an attack roll with this weapon, upgrade one hit to a crit.

traits.name: Concussive
traits.effect: After performing an attack with this weapon, if at least one hit or crit is scored, the target is shoved 3" directly away from the attacker.

traits.name: Heavy
traits.effect: This weapon cannot be fired if the Fighter has moved more than 2" this turn.

traits.name: Lethal
traits.effect: If an attack with this weapon would normally crit on a 6, it now also crits on a 5.

traits.name: Limited(1)
traits.effect: This item can only be used once per battle.

traits.name: Parry
traits.effect: When this fighter is targeted in melee, increase their Defence by 1.

traits.name: Piercing
traits.effect: For the next attack with this weapon, subtract 2 from the target’s Defence to a minimun of 3.

traits.name: Pistol
traits.effect: Pistols are one-handed weapons. When in melee range (0-3) attacks with this weapon use Ballistic Skill.

traits.name: Rapid Fire
traits.effect: For the rest of the turn, attacks with this weapon gain +1 attack dice.

traits.name: Reliable
traits.effect: If this attack rolls no hits or crits, change one miss to a hit.

traits.name: Silent
traits.effect: Making this attack does not trigger reactions or abilities from enemy fighters.

traits.name: Spread
traits.effect: This attack may target up to two targets within 1" of each other.

traits.name: Stun
traits.effect: Target fighter loses their next action and cannot make reactions until their next activation.

traits.name: Unwieldy
traits.effect: This fighter cannot use this weapon to make Reactions.

traits.name: Suppressive
traits.effect: Targets hit by this weapon must spend their next action to make a Move action toward the nearest cover.

traits.name: Precision
traits.effect: This attack ignores the +1 cover bonus when the target is within half range.

traits.name: Point-Blank
traits.effect: When attacking a target within 3", this weapon crits on a 5+.

traits.name: High Impact
traits.effect: Critical hits with this weapon deal +2 damage instead of the standard value.

traits.name: Sniper
traits.effect: If this fighter did not move this turn, they may add +12" to the maximum range of this attack.

traits.name: Assassin’s Mark
traits.effect: Mark a visible enemy within 6". While within 1" of a friendly with a Stealth token, that enemy has -1 Defence.

traits.name: Fade into Shadows
traits.effect: This fighter gains a Stealth token.

traits.name: Leader
traits.effect: Choose two friendly fighters within 6" of this model. Both fighters may immediately perform a free 3" move (this cannot be used to leave Melee Range).

traits.name: Shadow Step
traits.effect: Choose a point within 6” that is not visible to any enemy. Teleport this fighter to that point.

traits.name: Silent Ambush
traits.effect: This fighter makes a bonus Move if they have a Stealth token and are not visible.

traits.name: Smoke Bomb
traits.effect: Friendly fighters within 6" gain a Stealth token if they are not currently visible to enemy fighters.

traits.name: Vanish
traits.effect: Remove fighter from board, set up 6"+ from enemies. Gain Stealth token.

gear.name: Ballistic Shield
gear.effect: +1 Defence while in cover. Can be used for Shield Strike attacks.

gear.name: Kevlar Vest
gear.effect: Standard light protection +1 Def. No movement penalty.

gear.name: Tactical Plate Carrier
gear.effect: +1 Defence. Standard issue for frontline operators.

gear.name: Combat Bike
gear.effect: High mobility scouting vehicle. Increases Wounds (Chassis) and Movement.

gear.name: Night Vision Goggles
gear.effect: Allows the fighter to ignore range penalties from 'Low Light' rules.

gear.name: Stims / Adrenaline
gear.effect: One use only. Heal 1d3 wounds or remove a Stun effect.

gear.name: Laser Sight
gear.effect: Increase the BS of a weapon when fired at a target between 3 and 8.

gear.name: Comm-Link / Radio
gear.effect: Fighter may use the Leadership or Ability of a friendly officer within 12".

gear.name: Breaching Charges
gear.effect: Destroys a section of wall or door. Targets within 1" take damage.
